title: Maneye Mantralaya
subTitle: While Vishwanath orchestrates a plan to alienate Shreya from Srikar, Kamal's visible exhaustion during the board meeting leads to an awkward lapse in professionalism.

title: Sri Gandhada Gudi
subTitle: An emotional tale of heritage, devotion, and loyalty as a family strives to uphold its legacy, confronting obstacles and safeguarding cherished traditions.

title: Muddu Sose
subTitle: Vidya's dream of becoming a doctor is threatened when her father decides to get her married. Unfortunately, her father-in-law also believes that women should not pursue education.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya feels helpless as Tarakasura and his army launch a fierce attack on the battlefield. Concerned for his son's safety, Lord Shiva instructs Veerabhadra to assist Karthikeya in winning the war. Can Veerabhadra successfully aid Karthikeya.

title: Shantam Paapam
subTitle: Desperately in need of money for her father's transplant, Shyamala agrees to be a surrogate mother. But later, she is forced to make a horrifying choice when her friend asks her to abort the child.

title: Prema Kavya
subTitle: Two sisters, Prema and Kavya, are pushed into marriages they don't want. However, they struggle with love and lies as they seek happiness in their relationships.

title: Raani
subTitle: Rani, who has a hearing impairment, leads a quiet life in a village with her pet goat, Cherry. However, her peaceful existence changes when she meets Arjun, a well-mannered city boy.
